'''ngonataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kuchcha|kuchcha]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kuchcha|kuchcha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngonataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngonatithi|ngonatithi]] || [[word:ngonatiji|ngonatiji]] || [[word:ngonatishi|ngonatishi]] || [[word:ngonatiki|ngonatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngonatuthuthu|ngonatuthuthu]] || [[word:ngonatujuju|ngonatujuju]] || [[word:ngonatushushu|ngonatushushu]] || [[word:ngonatukuku|ngonatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngonatuthu|ngonatuthu]] || [[word:ngonatuju|ngonatuju]] || [[word:ngonatushu|ngonatushu]] || [[word:ngonatuku|ngonatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngonatufthuf|ngonatufthuf]] || [[word:ngonatufjuf|ngonatufjuf]] || [[word:ngonatufshuf|ngonatufshuf]] || [[word:ngonatufkuf|ngonatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngonatethe|ngonatethe]] || [[word:ngonateje|ngonateje]] || [[word:ngonateshe|ngonateshe]] || [[word:ngonateke|ngonateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngonatothotho|ngonatothotho]] || [[word:ngonatojojo|ngonatojojo]] || [[word:ngonatoshosho|ngonatoshosho]] || [[word:ngonatokoko|ngonatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngonatotho|ngonatotho]] || [[word:ngonatojo|ngonatojo]] || [[word:ngonatosho|ngonatosho]] || [[word:ngonatoko|ngonatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngonatofthof|ngonatofthof]] || [[word:ngonatofjof|ngonatofjof]] || [[word:ngonatofshof|ngonatofshof]] || [[word:ngonatofkof|ngonatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfthĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfjĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfshĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfkĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfthĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfjĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfshĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfkĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfthĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfjĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfshĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngonatĂŻfkĂŻf|ngonatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngonatĂŠthĂŠ|ngonatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngonatĂŠjĂŠ|ngonatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngonatĂŠshĂŠ|ngonatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngonatĂŠkĂŠ|ngonatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngonatathatha|ngonatathatha]] || [[word:ngonatajaja|ngonatajaja]] || [[word:ngonatashasha|ngonatashasha]] || [[word:ngonatakaka|ngonatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngonatatha|ngonatatha]] || [[word:ngonataja|ngonataja]] || [[word:ngonatasha|ngonatasha]] || [[word:ngonataka|ngonataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngonatafthaf|ngonatafthaf]] || [[word:ngonatafjaf|ngonatafjaf]] || [[word:ngonatafshaf|ngonatafshaf]] || [[word:ngonatafkaf|ngonatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngonatasha|ngonatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngonatshĂ«asha|ngonatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngonatroasha|ngonatroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngonatmuasha|ngonatmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngonatyaasha|ngonatyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongonatnkshĂ«asha|gongonatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongonatnkroasha|gongonatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongonatnkmuasha|gongonatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongonatnkyaasha|gongonatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngonanatasha|ngonanatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngonanatshĂ«asha|ngonanatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngonanatroasha|ngonanatroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngonanatmuasha|ngonanatmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngonanatyaasha|ngonanatyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongonanatnkshĂ«asha|gongonanatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongonanatnkroasha|gongonanatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongonanatnkmuasha|gongonanatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongonanatnkyaasha|gongonanatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngenĂŠtasha|ngenĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngenĂŠtshĂ«asha|ngenĂŠtshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngenĂŠtroasha|ngenĂŠtroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngenĂŠtmuasha|ngenĂŠtmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngenĂŠtyaasha|ngenĂŠtyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongenĂŠtnkshĂ«asha|gongenĂŠtnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongenĂŠtnkroasha|gongenĂŠtnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongenĂŠtnkmuasha|gongenĂŠtnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongenĂŠtnkyaasha|gongenĂŠtnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngonfatasha|ngonfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngonfatshĂ«asha|ngonfatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngonfatroasha|ngonfatroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngonfatmuasha|ngonfatmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngonfatyaasha|ngonfatyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongonfatnkshĂ«asha|gongonfatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongonfatnkroasha|gongonfatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongonfatnkmuasha|gongonfatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongonfatnkyaasha|gongonfatnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
